base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spell_ring_sleep_stopspell — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. Sleep spell (orange ring) or Stopspell (yellow-ring). Expands outward from caster to target. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame concentric-ring growing from circle — Sleep spell (orange ring) or Stopspell (yellow-ring). Expands outward from caster to target
